description: Active-run contiguous anomaly windows for the selected scope.
sql:
SELECT * FROM (
WITH active_manifest AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM featurestore:merged_anomaly_processing_manifest_v2
  WHERE status = 'active'
    AND algorithm_version = 'ds-v1'
    AND fleet_name = :fleet_name
    AND pad_name = :pad_name
    AND (
      COALESCE(CAST(:well_name AS TEXT), '') IN ('', '__ALL__')
      OR name = CAST(:well_name AS TEXT)
    )
)
SELECT
  e.event_id,
  e.name AS well_name,
  e.stage_num_td AS stage_num,
  e.anomaly,
  e.anomaly_display,
  e.start_ts,
  e.end_ts,
  e.duration_sec,
  e.duration_min
FROM active_manifest m
JOIN featurestore:merged_anomaly_events_v2 e
  ON e.processing_run_id = m.active_run_id
 AND e.name = m.name
 AND e.stage_num_td = m.stage_num_td
 AND e.algorithm_version = m.algorithm_version
ORDER BY e.start_ts DESC, e.name, e.stage_num_td
) q
